Risk Description: Because of repeated defect reopenings and higher retesting cycles in QA, there is a risk that test cycles will extend, which could lead to financial loss and delayed delivery.
Because of recurring environment dependencies and PR approval delays, there is a risk that timelines will slip, which could lead to SLA breach and delayed go-live.
Because developer utilization reached 82% (above 80% threshold) due to fixes and PR delays, there is a risk that resource fatigue may occur, which could lead to quality issues and delivery delays.
